zh.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: 英國蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary是Geoffrey de Inverkunglas的兒子，於1160年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪。他至少有2個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: 英国苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary是Geoffrey de Inverkunglas的儿子，于1160年出生在英国苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪。他至少有2个女儿。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary was born in 1160, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. He had at least 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary est né en 1160, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. Il a eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary wurde 1160 in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Geoffrey de Inverkunglas geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary è nato il nel 1160 nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: イギリススコットランドフィフキルクカルディ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balwearyは1160年にイギリススコットランドフィフキルクカルディでGeoffrey de Inverkunglasの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary(은)는 1160년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 커k캘디에서 Geoffrey de Inverkunglas의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: Kirkcaldy, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary nasceu em 1160, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary родился в 1160 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Balweary nació en 1160, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Geoffrey de Inverkunglas. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
